'''Telik''' was a [[Major/Legends|major]] of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] following the death of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]].

==Biography==
Imperial Major Telik served as the commander of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Broak Vessery]]'s ground assault forces, during the time following the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]]. After [[Ysanne Isard]] gained control of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Arnothian]]'s TIE Defender facility and began planning the fall of [[Prince-Admiral/Legends|Prince-Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel]], Telik's forces were called upon to assist [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] in the infiltration of the planet [[Ciutric IV]].

Unknown to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Telik was the agent on [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] who provided [[Iella Wessiri Antilles|Iella Wessiri]] with a holdout blaster, after she was captured by agents in the law offices of [[Wooter, Rimki, and Vass, Attorneys at Law|Wooter, Rimki, and Vass]]. Telik was impressed with Iella's ability to escape the situation claiming that, ''"Not but one out of a dozen people could have done what she did."'' The Rogues, in the guise of [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Antar Roat's]] experimental flight group, agreed to "defect" to join Krennel, while Telik's team worked on the ground to bring down Ciutric's defenses. Telik's team was also in charge of rescuing the prisoners who were held on the ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
